message:
fix: address several code issues found in review

- config.rs: Add "prev_track" to valid_media_actions (daemon supports it
  but validation was rejecting it)
- hid/mock.rs: Add buffer bounds check in get_feature_report() to prevent
  potential panic with small buffers; add test for this case
- logging/mod.rs: Remove unreachable code branch in rotate() - the condition
  `i + 1 > keep_files` was always false since loop iterates 1..keep_files
- bin/hid_blocking.rs: Remove unused Duration import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
